title: agropyron repens f. pilosum
intro: Agropyron repens f. pilosum, also known as couch grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Agropyron repens f. pilosum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
